title: Saudian Lamb Kebabs
description: A traditional Saudian dish made with marinated lamb and grilled to perfection. Serve with your favorite sides for a delicious meal.
instructions: Combine kebab spices, olive oil, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
Add lamb cubes to the bowl and mix until coated with spices.
Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches a safe internal temperature of 145°F.
Let kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with Arabian Creamy Sauce, if desired.
